title: Kurukshetra KUK UG Admission Online Form

content.text: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 : Get complete details about KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026, including admission updates, total seats, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, merit list, counselling, admission, and more.

rows.text: Kurukshetra University, Kurukshetra (KUK) UG, Integrated & AEDP Programmes 2026-27 Short Details of KUK UG Admission Notification

Notification Out : 07/05/2026 Starting Date : 07/05/2026 Last Date : 31/05/2026 11:55 PM 1st Merit List Release Date : 08/06/2026 At 10 AM DV & Fees Payment : Upto 10/06/2026 Till 11:55 PM 2nd Merit List Release Date : 12/06/2026 At 10 AM DV & Fees Payment : Upto 15/06/2026 Till 11:55 PM Final Merit List Release Date : 22/06/2026 At 10 AM DV & Fees Payment : Upto 23/06/2026 Till 11:55 PM List For Supernumerary Seats : 22/06/2026 At 10 AM DV & Fees Payment : Upto 23/06/2026 Till 11:55 PM Admission Date (Without Late Fees) : 08-23 June 2026 Admission Date (With 1000/- Late Fee) : 24-30 June 2026 Commencement of Classes : From 15/07/2026
Attendance For Participating in Final List

After the Second List, the interested applicants who are otherwise eligible and whose names either have not appeared in any of the list(s) or have appeared in the list but failed to deposit their dues, must mark their attendance online by paying fee of Rs.100/- on the admission portal as per following schedule: Starting Date : 16/06/2026 Last Date : 18/06/2026 11:55 PM
General : 1200/- SC / BC : 300/- PH (Divyang) : 300/- Payment Mode : Online Mode Additional Course Fees : 500/- Additional Course Fee (SC/BC/DA) : 125/-
